mapper.sql: id, source_id, source_name, title, title_zh, summary, summary_zh, source_url, cover_image, language, region_type, category, tags_json, hot_score, publish_time, status, is_pinned, translation_status, ai_summary_status, deleted, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
select from tech_briefing_article
order by is_pinned desc, hot_score desc, publish_time desc
order by is_pinned desc, publish_time desc, id desc
limit #{offset}, #{limit}
select from tech_briefing_article where deleted = 0 and status = 'READY' order by is_pinned desc, hot_score desc, publish_time desc limit #{limit}
select distinct category from tech_briefing_article where deleted = 0 and status = 'READY' and category is not null and category != '' order by category asc
select from tech_briefing_article where id = #{id} limit 1
select from tech_briefing_article where source_url = #{sourceUrl} limit 1
mapper.update: update tech_briefing_article set source_id = #{sourceId}, source_name = #{sourceName}, title = #{title}, title_zh = #{titleZh}, summary = #{summary}, summary_zh = #{summaryZh}, source_url = #{sourceUrl}, cover_image = #{coverImage}, language = #{language}, region_type = #{regionType}, category = #{category}, tags_json = #{tagsJson}, hot_score = #{hotScore}, publish_time = #{publishTime}, status = #{status}, is_pinned = #{isPinned}, translation_status = #{translationStatus}, ai_summary_status = #{aiSummaryStatus}, deleted = #{deleted} where id = #{id}
mapper.select: select from tech_briefing_article where deleted = 0 order by is_pinned desc, publish_time desc, id desc
